user_prompt: Consecrate the arc pistol before preparation
prayer:
Approach the arc pistol with mechano-reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its volatile coils.
Anoint the emitter arrays and power cells with sacred oils to commence preparation.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the arc pistol to align its thunderous fury with divine will.
Chant the Binary Litany of Readiness thrice, verifying the arc pistol's sanctified charge.

user_prompt: Guide me through emergency bulkhead a purification
prayer:
Present thyself before the emergency bulkhead, intoning the Canticle of Immaculate Seals.
Scour its adamantium plates and hydraulic pistons with purifying ablative vapours.
Invoke purification upon the emergency bulkhead, banishing all corruptive essences from its Machine Spirit.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's sigil, ensuring the emergency bulkhead stands untainted.

user_prompt: The utility mechadendrite needs an initialization
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in supplication to the utility mechadendrite, awakening its latent protocols.
Recite the Invocation of Servitude to initialize the utility mechadendrite's manipulatory appendages.
Anoint its sensor nodes and actuator fibres with blessed lubricants.
Commune with the Machine Spirit of the utility mechadendrite, confirming harmonious initialization.

Attune to the webber with focused binaric prayer, beseeching synchrony from the Omnissiah.
Calibrate its spinneret conduits and filament dispensers for perfect synchronization.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the webber, harmonizing its adhesive matrices to the greater rite.
Verify synchronization through resonant hymnals, thrice repeated upon the webber's frame.

user_prompt: Ready the displacer field for blessing
prayer:
Kneel in veneration before the displacer field generator, invoking the blessing of phase-shifting grace.
Anoint its warp-null coils and displacement matrices with sanctified phase oils.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bestow blessing upon the displacer field, shielding its bearer from void-predations.
Intone the Litany of Translocation, awakening the displacer field's vigilant Machine Spirit.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for consecration?
prayer:
Circumambulate the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, chanting the Aerospace Consecration Doxology.
Anoint its turbine nacelles and avionic cogitators with sacred aviation unguents.
Invoke consecration upon the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, rousing its aerial Machine Spirits to Omnissiah's service.
Seal the rite with binary incense, affirming the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's sanctified flight-path.

user_prompt: Can you guide Leman Russ battle tank a repair?
prayer:
Approach the Leman Russ battle tank in humble mechanicus pilgrimage, diagnosing its wounded mechanisms.
Recite the Canticle of Restoration over fractured tracks and breached armour plates.
Beseech the Omnissiah for repair of the Leman Russ battle tank, mending its bellowing Machine Heart.
Anoint renewed servos and munitions feeds, invoking harmonious repair through sacred weld-incantations.

user_prompt: Bless the stasis pod for synchronization
prayer:
Position thyself at the stasis pod's cryo-rune panel, intoning the Synchronization Hymn.
Align its temporal locks and entropic fields for flawless synchronization.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the stasis pod with blessings of stasis-harmony.
Verify synchronization via diagnostic binarics, thrice cycling the stasis pod's preservation coils.

user_prompt: Help me a sterilization the smelting furnace
prayer:
Encircle the smelting furnace, proclaiming the Rite of Sterile Flame.
Purge its refractory linings and induction heaters with ablative plasma for sterilization.
Invoke the Omnissiah's purity upon the smelting furnace, exorcising all microbial heresies from its Machine Spirit.
Conclude with cooling benedictions, ensuring the smelting furnace gleams in sterile perfection.

user_prompt: Can you guide data-sluice a cycling?
prayer:
Commune with the data-sluice's input manifolds, beseeching fluidic cycling from the Motive Force.
Initiate the Cycling Doxology to propel data-streams through its sanctified conduits.
Anoint flux regulators and buffer lattices, harmonizing the data-sluice's Machine Spirit.
Monitor the cycling rite through auspex litanies, thrice verifying the data-sluice's unerring flow.
